subject: [RFC PATCH 6/8] dax/kmem: add the demotion and numa_balancing opt-ins for private nodes

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch adds two new sysfs opt-ins for private nodes in the Linux kernel: 'demotion' and 'numa_balancing'. The 'demotion' option requires reclaim to be enabled, which is enforced at hotplug by node_private_register(). This allows administrators to control how memory is allocated on a per-device basis.
